200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Royal Challenge - Season 29
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A136
Supernova

Triggers: Once in a while

The unit casts decay on the armor of 3 random enemies (preferred target: mages). When the enemy’s armor is decayed, that enemy takes 250000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 30% for 5 sec. Also, that enemy takes 200000 magic damage over 5 sec. If the target has less than 75% health left after taking pure damage from the decay, it explodes and deals magic damage equal to 20% of its max health to itself and all enemies in a small radius around it. Also, all enemies affected by the explosion are silenced for 3 sec. Silenced enemies can’t use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped).

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
